completed_at.description: The timestamp when the signing job was completed.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the signing job was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the signing job.

job_invoker.description: The entity that initiated the signing job.

job_owner.description: The owner of the signing job.

platform_display_name.description: The display name of the platform used for signing.

platform_id.description: The identifier of the platform used for signing.

profile_name.description: The name of the signing profile.

profile_version.description: The version of the signing profile.

requested_by.description: The entity that requested the signing job.

revocation_record.description: Details of the revocation, including reason, timestamp, and who revoked it.

signature_expires_at.description: The timestamp when the signature will expire.

signed_object.description: Information about the signed object stored in S3.

source.description: Source information of the object to be signed, stored in S3.

status.description: The current status of the signing job.

status_reason.description: The reason for the current status of the signing job.
